description: Type-safe RPC framework for Node.js & TypeScript microservices over a Redis message queue — self-describing services generate their own strongly-typed clients.
rules: Define a service as a class extending IMQService and mark callable methods with the @expose() decorator.
JSDoc on exposed methods is the type source — the client is generated from the running service, not hand-written.
Generate the typed client with the imq CLI: `imq client generate <ServiceName>`.
Correlation, timeouts, at-least-once delivery and serialization are handled by the library, not your service code.
@imqueue is GPL-3.0; a commercial license is available for closed-source use (see imqueue.com/license).
